home.title: Document & publish Kraken models
home.subtitle: Describe your HTR/OCR model using the HTRMoPo metadata scheme, publish it to Zenodo with a citable DOI, and keep every version tracked in one place.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.text: This application is hosted and maintained by Inria Paris.

funding.title: Funding
funding.text: This project is developed in the context of ATRIUM. ATRIUM is funded by the European Union under Grant Agreement n. 101132163. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

catalog.title: Model catalog
catalog.subtitle: Kraken models published through this app, with their full HTRMoPo metadata and version history.
catalog.empty: No models match your filters yet.

myModels.placeholderBadge: no metadata yet — publish a new version to add it
myModels.upgradeHelp: This model uses the legacy v0 metadata format. Publish a new version to upgrade it to the current HTRMoPo schema.

detail.legacyOwnerNote: This model uses the legacy v0 metadata format. Publish a new version to upgrade it to the current HTRMoPo schema.
detail.citationReminder: Models like this represent real scholarship — training data, careful evaluation, hours of work. A citation is a small way to credit that.

progress.creatingDeposition: Creating a new record on Zenodo…

form.summaryHelp: A short, descriptive title for the model.
form.datasetsHelp: Pick a dataset from the HTR-United catalog, or type an external URL below.
form.baseModelHelp: Pick a fine-tuning base from models already in this catalog, or type an external URL below.
form.citationHelp: Link to the paper describing this model, if one exists (not the model card itself).
form.collaboratorsHelp: Secondary authors/collaborators. Not part of the HTRMoPo catalog metadata, but sent to Zenodo's own collaborators field if set.
form.metricsHelp: Common metrics: CER (Character Error Rate), WER (Word Error Rate), mAP (mean Average Precision), Accuracy, F1 score. Use whatever is relevant to this model's task.
form.bodyMdHelp: The long-form description shown on the model's page and as the Zenodo record description.
form.dropFiles: Drag files here or click to browse
form.versionLabelHelp: A free-text version label (e.g. "1.6.0") for this release. Not part of the HTRMoPo catalog metadata, but sent to Zenodo's own version field if set.
form.private: Request community inclusion (uncheck for a private/test upload)
form.publishConfirm: This will publish an immutable, citable record on {env}. Continue?
form.validationErrors: Please fix the following before publishing:
form.noFilesError: Attach at least one model file before publishing.
form.zenodoMetadataNudge: This app only sends the HTRMoPo card fields to Zenodo. Head over to the record on Zenodo to fill in anything else it supports but this form doesn't cover — funding/grant information in particular.

auth.sandboxBanner: This deployment talks to the Zenodo Sandbox (sandbox.zenodo.org) — test data only, not durable.
auth.loginPrompt: Connect your Zenodo account to upload or version models.
auth.notAuthenticated: You need to connect with Zenodo first.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Try
playground.dropImage: Drop an image here, or click to browse
playground.runningWarning: Some models are slower than others (e.g. party can take ~10 minutes per page on this demo server) — this is a playground. Leaving and resubmitting will simply queue your request again, and requests are limited to a fixed number of pages per hour.
playground.needModels: Please select a segmentation and a recognition model.
playground.rateLimitExceeded: You've reached the limit of playground requests for now — please try again later.
playground.queueFull: The playground queue is full right now — please try again in a few minutes.
playground.unknownError: Something went wrong while processing this image.
